Custom Large Vinyl Banner Printing for Building Wraps & Stadium Installations

Create massive visual impact with large vinyl banners from Banners.com, designed for building wraps, stadium displays, and high-profile outdoor installations. Our large format custom banners are digitally printed in full color on durable 13 oz vinyl material that's scratch-proof and waterproof for demanding weather conditions.

Available in sizes up to 16' x 50', these large scale banners deliver maximum visibility for construction sites, sports venues, trade shows, and commercial building applications. Choose from premium 13 oz matte vinyl for rich color reproduction or breathable mesh material for windy outdoor conditions.

Professional installation features include heat-welded hems, reinforced grommets, pole pockets, and reinforced corners for secure mounting on buildings, fences, and stadium structures. All large vinyl banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art large-format printers.

Key Features for Large Format Applications:

  • 13 oz vinyl material for outdoor durability
  • Sizes up to 16' x 50' for building coverage
  • Weather-resistant and scratch-proof construction
  • Professional finishing options for secure installation
  • Full-color digital printing with vibrant color reproduction
  • Standard 3-day production with rush options available

Due to shipping regulations, all large banners will be folded for shipping. Contact us for freight shipping options if folding is not suitable for your installation.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Large Banner Materials for Outdoor & Wind-Resistant Applications

Choose from two premium materials specifically designed for large format banner applications, each engineered for different installation environments and weather conditions.

13 oz Matte Vinyl for Building Wraps

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is the most popular choice for large format applications. Features a low shine finish with rich color gamut ideal for building wraps, stadium banners, and commercial installations where maximum color impact is required.

  • Superior color reproduction for high-visibility applications
  • Scratch-resistant surface for handling during installation
  • Waterproof construction for all-weather outdoor use
  • Matte finish reduces glare for optimal viewing

8 oz Mesh Material for Windy Conditions

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh featuring a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows 37% airflow. This material is specifically designed for outdoor applications in windy conditions, reducing wind load on mounting structures.

  • 37% air permeability reduces wind stress
  • Ideal for fence installations and outdoor structures
  • Maintains image quality while allowing airflow
  • Recommended for permanent outdoor installations

Material Considerations: Vinyl is temperature-sensitive and may experience up to 1/2 inch variance per linear foot due to heat application during printing and finishing. Contact customer service if precise sizing is critical for your installation.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Large Vinyl Banner Finishing Options for Professional Installation

Professional finishing options ensure secure mounting and long-term durability for large format banner installations on buildings, stadiums, and outdoor structures.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Standard finishing includes heat-welded hems with brass grommets spaced every 24 inches for secure attachment to building surfaces, fence structures, or mounting hardware.

  • Heat-welded construction prevents tearing
  • Brass grommets resist corrosion in outdoor conditions
  • 24-inch spacing provides secure mounting points
  • Reinforced edges distribute stress evenly

Pole Pockets

Pole pocket finishing creates a sleeve along banner edges for insertion of mounting poles or tensioning systems, ideal for stadium displays and temporary installations.

Reinforced Corners

Additional reinforcement at banner corners prevents tearing at high-stress points during installation and in windy conditions.

Reinforced Hems

Double-fold hem construction with additional material reinforcement for heavy-duty applications requiring maximum durability.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

Available for applications requiring visibility from both sides, featuring two printed panels with blockout material to prevent show-through between images.

All finishing options are designed to withstand outdoor installation stresses and provide long-term durability for large format banner applications.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Large Banner Orders

Large format banner production times are calculated from artwork approval and payment confirmation. All production schedules exclude weekends and holidays.

Production Timeline Options

1 Business Day Priority:
Fastest production for urgent large banner installations. Subject to size and quantity limitations.

2 Business Days Express:
Expedited production for time-sensitive building wraps and stadium display projects.

3 Business Days Standard:
Standard production timeline for most large format banner orders, providing optimal balance of speed and cost-effectiveness.

5 Business Days Saver:
Economy timeline for large banner orders with flexible installation schedules.

Production Considerations for Large Banners

  • Production begins after artwork approval and payment confirmation
  • Complex finishing options may require additional production time
  • Large quantities may extend production schedules
  • Rush production subject to current capacity and material availability

Production schedules are estimates and may vary based on current order volume. Contact customer service for specific timing requirements for your large banner installation project.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Large Banner Printing Services

Multiple payment options available for large format banner orders, designed to accommodate both individual customers and commercial accounts requiring large banner installations.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal for secure online transactions
  • Net terms available for qualified commercial accounts
  • Purchase orders accepted from government and institutional customers
  • Wire transfers for large international orders

Commercial Account Benefits

Establish a commercial account for streamlined ordering and payment processing for recurring large banner projects:

  • Net 30 payment terms for qualified customers
  • Volume pricing for large quantity orders
  • Dedicated account management
  • Streamlined approval process for repeat orders

Payment is processed upon order placement, with production beginning after payment confirmation and final artwork approval. Contact our customer service team for assistance with commercial account setup or special payment arrangements for large banner orders.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Large Format Banner Delivery

Large vinyl banners require specialized shipping considerations due to their size and weight. All large banners will be folded for standard shipping unless freight options are selected.

Standard Shipping Methods

Folded Shipping: Due to shipping regulations, large banners are folded for ground and air shipment. Professional folding minimizes creasing, and fold lines typically relax after installation.

Freight Shipping Options: Available for customers who require banners shipped flat or rolled. Contact customer service for custom freight quotes based on banner dimensions and destination.

Shipping Considerations

  • Large banners over certain dimensions require freight shipping
  • Delivery times vary by destination and shipping method selected
  • Residential deliveries may require special arrangements for large packages
  • Installation site delivery available in select markets

Packaging and Handling

All large banners are carefully packaged to prevent damage during shipping:

  • Protective wrapping prevents moisture and handling damage
  • Reinforced packaging for heavy-duty banner materials
  • Clear labeling for easy identification at delivery
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments

Contact customer service to discuss specific shipping requirements for your large banner installation timeline and delivery location.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Large Banner Applications for Building & Stadium Use

Large vinyl banners excel in high-visibility applications where maximum impact and professional presentation are essential. These applications showcase the versatility and durability of large format banner printing.

Building Wrap Applications

Transform building exteriors with large vinyl banners designed for construction sites, retail locations, and commercial buildings:

  • Construction site barriers and safety messaging
  • Retail store grand opening and promotional campaigns
  • Building renovation coverings with branding
  • Commercial building advertisements and announcements

Stadium and Sports Venue Displays

Large banners provide maximum visibility for stadium and arena applications:

  • Stadium perimeter advertising and sponsor displays
  • Championship banners and team recognition
  • Event signage and directional displays
  • Concourse and entrance way branding

Trade Show and Event Applications

Large format banners create impactful displays for trade shows and special events:

  • Backdrop banners for exhibition booths
  • Stage backdrops and presentation displays
  • Registration and directional signage
  • Outdoor event perimeter displays

Optimal Viewing Distances

Large banners are designed for viewing distances of 10 feet and greater, making them ideal for:

  • Highway and roadside visibility (50+ foot viewing distance)
  • Stadium seating areas (25+ foot viewing distance)
  • Building exteriors (15+ foot viewing distance)
  • Trade show floors (10+ foot viewing distance)
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Large Format Banner Printing

Large vinyl banners require specific artwork specifications to ensure optimal print quality and visual impact at viewing distances. Follow these guidelines for professional results.

File Specifications for Large Banners

  • Resolution: Minimum 100 DPI at full size (150 DPI preferred for close viewing)
  • File Formats: PDF, EPS, AI, or high-resolution JPG/PNG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 2-inch bleed on all sides for finishing

Design Considerations

Text and Graphics: Large banners are viewed from significant distances. Use bold fonts and high-contrast graphics for maximum readability:

  • Minimum text size varies by viewing distance
  • Sans-serif fonts provide better readability at distance
  • High contrast between text and background colors
  • Simple, bold graphics work better than detailed images

Artwork Review Process

Digital Proofs: All large banner artwork receives digital proof review before production begins. This allows for color and layout verification.

Color Match Proof System: For critical color matching requirements, hard copy proofs available upon request for additional fee.

Design Services Available

Professional design services available for customers requiring custom artwork creation:

  • Custom design from concept to completion
  • Logo recreation and enhancement for large format
  • Typography and layout optimization for viewing distance
  • Brand guideline compliance for corporate installations

Upload print-ready files through our online ordering system, or select design services during the ordering process for professional artwork creation.

Order Custom Large Vinyl Banners for Your Next Project

Ready to create maximum impact with large vinyl banners? Start your order today with instant online quotes for sizes up to 16' x 50'. Whether you need building wraps, stadium displays, or trade show backdrops, our large format banners deliver professional results with durable materials and expert finishing.

Three Easy Ways to Get Started

Upload Your Print-Ready Artwork
Have professional artwork ready? Simply choose your banner size, select material and finishing options, then upload your files for immediate production.

Use Our Free Design Templates
Browse our collection of customizable templates designed specifically for large format applications. Add your text, logos, and images to create professional results.

Professional Design Services
Let our design team create custom artwork optimized for large format printing and your specific viewing distance requirements. Include special instructions for our designers during the ordering process.

All large vinyl banners are printed in the USA with standard 3-day production and multiple rush options available. Get started on your large banner project today and create the visual impact your installation demands.

Need assistance with your large banner project? Call (320) 391-5300 to speak with our customer service team, or request a custom quote for special sizing, unique applications, or volume pricing.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Large Vinyl Banner FAQ

What materials are available for large vinyl banners?

Large vinyl banners are available in two materials: 13 oz matte vinyl for building wraps and high-visibility applications, and 8 oz mesh material with 37% airflow for windy outdoor conditions. Both materials are printed with full-color digital printing and finished with professional-grade options for secure installation.

What's the maximum size for large vinyl banner printing?

We can print large vinyl banners up to 16' x 50' using our large format printing equipment. Custom sizes are available within these maximum dimensions. Contact us for quotes on banners requiring precise dimensions or unique proportions for building wrap applications.

Where are large vinyl banners printed?

All large vinyl banners are manufactured and printed in the USA at our production facility using state-of-the-art large format printers. This ensures quality control and faster delivery times for large banner projects.

What are the most common applications for large vinyl banners?

Large vinyl banners are primarily used for building wraps, stadium advertising, construction site barriers, trade show backdrops, retail grand opening displays, and commercial building advertisements. They excel in applications requiring visibility from significant distances.

Do you offer double-sided printing for large vinyl banners?

Yes, double-sided large vinyl banners are available featuring two printed panels with blockout material to prevent image show-through. This option is ideal for banners that will be viewed from both sides, such as suspended stadium displays or freestanding installations.

How should I install a large vinyl banner?

Large vinyl banners can be installed using grommets and mounting hardware, pole pockets with tensioning systems, or professional mounting clips depending on the application. For building wraps and permanent installations, we recommend consulting with a professional installer due to the size and weight considerations.

How do I maintain large vinyl banners in outdoor conditions?

Large vinyl banners require minimal maintenance. Clean with mild soap and water as needed, and inspect mounting hardware periodically for security. The 13 oz vinyl material is designed to withstand weather conditions, but extreme weather may require temporary removal to prevent damage.

Are large vinyl banners suitable for high wind conditions?

For high wind applications, we recommend mesh material which allows 37% airflow and reduces wind load on the banner and mounting structure. Solid vinyl banners should be used with appropriate tensioning and secure mounting systems in windy conditions.

How do I choose between large vinyl banners and backdrop banners?

Large vinyl banners are designed for permanent or semi-permanent outdoor installation with durable finishing options. Backdrop banners are typically lighter weight materials designed for indoor trade show and event use with portable display systems. Consider your installation environment and duration when selecting.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
